languages.original_text: "Please excuse my close-lipped colleague. This is Nuncius's first time conducting a dialogue with a member of the Adeptus Astartes, and as such, he is somewhat... struggling to verbalise his thoughts."

languages.text: "Прошу извинить моего немногословного коллегу Нунциуса. Он впервые ведет диалог с представителем Адептус Астартес и оттого слегка... затрудняется с вербализацией своих мыслей".

"Please excuse my close-lipped colleague. This is Nuncius's first time conducting a dialogue with a member of the Adeptus Astartes, and as such, he is somewhat... struggling to verbalise his thoughts."
languages.original_text: "Прошу извинить моего немногословного коллегу Нунциуса. Он впервые ведет диалог с представителем Адептус Астартес и оттого слегка... затрудняется с вербализацией своих мыслей".

traits.locale_text: "Please excuse my close-lipped colleague. This is Nuncius's first time conducting a dialogue with a member of the Adeptus Astartes, and as such, he is somewhat... struggling to verbalise his thoughts."

"Please excuse my close-lipped colleague. This is Nuncius's first time conducting a dialogue with a member of the Adeptus Astartes, and as such, he is somewhat... struggling to verbalise his thoughts."

"Please excuse my close-lipped colleague. This is Nuncius's first time conducting a dialogue with a member of the Adeptus Astartes, and as such, he is somewhat... struggling to verbalise his thoughts."

languages.text: 「口数の少ない我が同僚を、どうかお許しください。ヌンキウスがアデプトゥス・アスタルテスの一員と対話を交わすのはこれが初めてでして、それゆえ、彼はいささか……自らの思考を言葉にするのに苦労しているのです」
languages.original_text: "Please excuse my close-lipped colleague. This is Nuncius's first time conducting a dialogue with a member of the Adeptus Astartes, and as such, he is somewhat... struggling to verbalise his thoughts."

traits.locale_text: 「口数の少ない我が同僚を、どうかお許しください。ヌンキウスがアデプトゥス・アスタルテスの一員と対話を交わすのはこれが初めてでして、それゆえ、彼はいささか……自らの思考を言葉にするのに苦労しているのです」

languages.text: “请别怪我这位同僚不爱说话。这是努恩修斯第一次跟阿斯塔特修会的成员对话，他不知该如何……组织语言。”
languages.original_text: "Please excuse my close-lipped colleague. This is Nuncius's first time conducting a dialogue with a member of the Adeptus Astartes, and as such, he is somewhat... struggling to verbalise his thoughts."

traits.locale_text: “请别怪我这位同僚不爱说话。这是努恩修斯第一次跟阿斯塔特修会的成员对话，他不知该如何……组织语言。”

languages.text: "Bitte verzeiht meinem schweigsamen Kollegen. Nuncius führt zum ersten Mal einem Dialog mit einem Mitglied des Adeptus Astartes und hat deshalb Schwierigkeiten, seine ... Gedanken zu verbalisieren."
languages.original_text: "Please excuse my close-lipped colleague. This is Nuncius's first time conducting a dialogue with a member of the Adeptus Astartes, and as such, he is somewhat... struggling to verbalise his thoughts."

traits.locale_text: "Bitte verzeiht meinem schweigsamen Kollegen. Nuncius führt zum ersten Mal einem Dialog mit einem Mitglied des Adeptus Astartes und hat deshalb Schwierigkeiten, seine ... Gedanken zu verbalisieren."

languages.text: « Veuillez excuser mon collègue silencieux. C'est la première fois que Nuncius converse avec un membre de l'Adeptus Astartes, ce qui fait qu'il a... quelques difficultés à exprimer verbalement ses pensées. »
languages.original_text: "Please excuse my close-lipped colleague. This is Nuncius's first time conducting a dialogue with a member of the Adeptus Astartes, and as such, he is somewhat... struggling to verbalise his thoughts."

traits.locale_text: « Veuillez excuser mon collègue silencieux. C'est la première fois que Nuncius converse avec un membre de l'Adeptus Astartes, ce qui fait qu'il a... quelques difficultés à exprimer verbalement ses pensées. »

languages.text: «Perdonen el silencio de mi colega. Es la primera vez que Nuncius dialoga con un miembro del Adeptus Astartes y, por lo tanto, le está... costando expresarse».
languages.original_text: "Please excuse my close-lipped colleague. This is Nuncius's first time conducting a dialogue with a member of the Adeptus Astartes, and as such, he is somewhat... struggling to verbalise his thoughts."

traits.locale_text: «Perdonen el silencio de mi colega. Es la primera vez que Nuncius dialoga con un miembro del Adeptus Astartes y, por lo tanto, le está... costando expresarse».

languages.text: "Lütfen ağzı sıkı meslektaşımı mazur görün. Bu, Nuncius'un Adeptus Astartes'in bir mensubuyla ilk kez diyalog kuruşu ve bu yüzden... Düşüncelerini sözcüklerle ifade etmekte biraz zorlanıyor."
languages.original_text: "Please excuse my close-lipped colleague. This is Nuncius's first time conducting a dialogue with a member of the Adeptus Astartes, and as such, he is somewhat... struggling to verbalise his thoughts."

traits.locale_text: "Lütfen ağzı sıkı meslektaşımı mazur görün. Bu, Nuncius'un Adeptus Astartes'in bir mensubuyla ilk kez diyalog kuruşu ve bu yüzden... Düşüncelerini sözcüklerle ifade etmekte biraz zorlanıyor."
